name: DrawingObject.NoAttributes
summary: The NoAttributes class defines attributes for objects that do not contain any attributes.

constructors.name: DrawingObject.NoAttributes()
constructors.summary: Creates a new default no attributes instance.

constructors.name: DrawingObject.NoAttributes(String)
constructors.summary: Creates a new no attributes instance. No attributes are loaded from the attribute file as it is not possible to load attributes for objects of this type.

params.name: AttributeFile
params.doc: The filename of the attribute file.

methods.name: IsEqual
methods.summary: Compares the current object with an object of the same type.

params.name: ObjectToCompare
params.doc: The object to be used for comparing.

returns.doc: True if all the fields (except for the database GUID) of the objects match.

methods.name: LoadAttributes
methods.summary: It is not possible to load attributes for objects of this type because the objects have no attributes.

params.name: AttributeFile
params.doc: The filename of the attribute file.

returns.doc: False because it is not possible to load attributes.
